ast.target: 最小化事件的类别已更新

ast.target: ZettelID 已添加并重命名文件

ast.target: 列表视图中不可用批量选择

ast.target: 在日历中未找到源事件

ast.target: 无法复制：事件没有开始日期

ast.target: 转换为真实事件失败：未找到虚拟事件 ID

ast.target: 不能将事件分配为自身的前提条件

ast.target: Prisma Calendar：批量选择模式未激活

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Prisma Calendar: No events found for this query. Ensure the base's folder filter matches the calendar's directory.
ast.target: Prisma Calendar：未找到此查询的事件。请确保基础文件夹过滤器与日历的目录匹配。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No calendar found for this file

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This note is not a calendar event

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Prisma reads an existing folder and turns your notes into events using your current properties.
ast.target: Prisma 读取现有文件夹，并使用您当前的属性将笔记转换为事件。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Use Gantt, Heatmap, and Dashboard to understand patterns and dependencies.
ast.target: 使用甘特图、热力图和仪表板来理解模式和依赖关系。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Sync Google, Apple, or Outlook using CalDAV and ICS.
ast.target: 使用 CalDAV 和 ICS 同步 Google、Apple 或 Outlook。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Create, edit, and organize events using natural language.
ast.target: 使用自然语言创建、编辑和组织事件。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Use unlimited calendars, presets, and API to shape your workflow.
ast.target: 使用无限日历、预设和 API 来塑造您的工作流程。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Your subscription isn't active — update billing to restore Pro.
ast.target: 您的订阅未激活 — 请更新账单以恢复 Pro 功能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Free up this device's activation seat — for example before moving to another computer. Click Verify to re-activate anytime.
ast.target: 释放此设备的激活席位 — 例如在更换到另一台电脑之前。点击验证可随时重新激活。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select categories to assign to all selected events. This will replace any existing categories.
ast.target: 选择要分配给所有选定事件的类别。这将替换任何现有类别。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select events that must complete before this event.
ast.target: 选择必须在此事件之前完成的事件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select a provider to pre-fill the server address
ast.target: 选择一个提供商以预填服务器地址

ast.name: description
ast.source: Override default notification timing for this event
ast.target: 覆盖此事件的默认通知时间

ast.name: description
ast.source: Generate instances from the source event start date instead of from today.
ast.target: 从源事件的开始日期生成实例，而不是从今天开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Activate the Pro license by key. Persists the key to plugin settings.
ast.target: 通过密钥激活 Pro 许可证。将密钥持久化到插件设置中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Return true if the Pro license is currently active.
ast.target: 如果 Pro 许可证当前处于活动状态，则返回 true。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Open the modal that creates a new tracked event. Fire-and-forget — does not wait for submission.
ast.target: 打开创建新跟踪事件的模态框。即发即忘 — 不等待提交。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Open the edit modal for the currently active note's event. Returns true if a matching event was resolved and the modal opened, false otherwise.
ast.target: 打开当前活动笔记对应事件的编辑模态框。如果找到匹配事件并打开了模态框则返回 true，否则返回 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create an untracked event note in the specified calendar. Returns the created file path, or null if creation failed.
ast.target: 在指定日历中创建一个未跟踪的事件笔记。返回创建的文件路径，如果创建失败则返回 null。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a new tracked event with the given title, start/end, and optional metadata. Returns the created file path, or null if creation failed.
ast.target: 使用给定的标题、开始/结束时间和可选元数据创建一个新的跟踪事件。返回创建的文件路径，如果创建失败则返回 null。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Edit fields of an existing event identified by filePath. Returns true on success, false if the event was not found.
ast.target: 编辑由 filePath 标识的现有事件的字段。成功时返回 true，如果未找到事件则返回 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Delete the event note at the given filePath. Returns true on success, false if the file did not exist.
ast.target: 删除给定 filePath 处的事件笔记。成功时返回 true，如果文件不存在则返回 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Convert an existing file (e.g., a plain note) into a calendar event with the supplied metadata. Returns true on success.
ast.target: 将现有文件（例如普通笔记）转换为具有所提供元数据的日历事件。成功时返回 true。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Convert a real event note to a virtual instance. Returns true on success.
ast.target: 将真实事件笔记转换为虚拟实例。成功时返回 true。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Promote a virtual event instance to a real note. Returns true on success.
ast.target: 将虚拟事件实例提升为真实笔记。成功时返回 true。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Move an event note from its current calendar to targetCalendarId. Returns a result envelope with success/movedFilePath/error fields.
ast.target: 将事件笔记从其当前日历移动到 targetCalendarId。返回一个包含 success/movedFilePath/error 字段的结果信封。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add a unique Zettel ID to the active note's frontmatter. Returns true on success.
ast.target: 向活动笔记的 frontmatter 添加一个唯一的 Zettel ID。成功时返回 true。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Duplicate the event associated with the active note. Returns true on success.
ast.target: 复制与活动笔记关联的事件。成功时返回 true。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Navigate the calendar to a specific date and optional view. Returns true if a view changed.
ast.target: 将日历导航到特定日期和可选视图。如果视图已更改则返回 true。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Return all events whose timed range overlaps [start, end). Both timestamps are ISO strings.
ast.target: 返回所有时间范围与 [start, end) 重叠的事件。两个时间戳均为 ISO 字符串。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Look up a single event by its file path. Returns the event payload, or null if not found.
ast.target: 通过文件路径查找单个事件。返回事件负载，如果未找到则返回 null。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Return every event known to the calendar (tracked + untracked).
ast.target: 返回日历已知的所有事件（已跟踪 + 未跟踪）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Return all distinct categories with their colours for the active calendar.
ast.target: 返回活动日历的所有不同类别及其颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Return the subset of events that are untracked (no Start Date).
ast.target: 返回未跟踪（无开始日期）的事件子集。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Stamp the event with completion frontmatter. Returns true on success.
ast.target: 用完成 frontmatter 标记事件。成功时返回 true。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Clear completion frontmatter from the event. Returns true on success.
ast.target: 清除事件的完成 frontmatter。成功时返回 true。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Toggle the skipped state of the event. Returns true on success.
ast.target: 切换事件的跳过状态。成功时返回 true。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Clone an event, optionally offsetting the clone's start by offsetMs. Returns the new file path or null.
ast.target: 克隆一个事件，可选地将克隆的开始时间偏移 offsetMs。返回新文件路径或 null。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shift an event's start (and end if timed) by offsetMs milliseconds. Returns true on success.
ast.target: 将事件的开始时间（如果是定时事件则包括结束时间）偏移 offsetMs 毫秒。成功时返回 true。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Mark every event note at the given filePaths as done. Returns true if all succeeded.
ast.target: 将给定 filePaths 处的所有事件笔记标记为已完成。如果全部成功则返回 true。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Clear the done status from every event note at the given filePaths. Returns true if all succeeded.
ast.target: 清除给定 filePaths 处所有事件笔记的完成状态。如果全部成功则返回 true。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Delete every event note at the given filePaths. Returns true if all succeeded.
ast.target: 删除给定 filePaths 处的所有事件笔记。如果全部成功则返回 true。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Toggle the skipped flag on every event note at the given filePaths. Returns true if all succeeded.
ast.target: 切换给定 filePaths 处所有事件笔记的跳过标志。如果全部成功则返回 true。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Force a refresh of the calendar view, re-reading events from disk.
ast.target: 强制刷新日历视图，从磁盘重新读取事件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Return summary info for one calendar bundle. Returns null if the calendarId is unknown.
ast.target: 返回一个日历包的摘要信息。如果 calendarId 未知则返回 null。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List all calendar bundles configured in the plugin.
ast.target: 列出插件中配置的所有日历包。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Aggregate statistics for the given date and interval. Returns null if the calendar can't be resolved or the date is invalid.
ast.target: 给定日期和间隔的聚合统计信息。如果无法解析日历或日期无效则返回 null。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Return the full settings snapshot for the resolved calendar bundle. Returns null if not found.
ast.target: 返回已解析日历包的完整设置快照。如果未找到则返回 null。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Apply a partial patch to the resolved calendar's settings. Returns true on success. Window-API only — URL transport cannot represent the nested settings object.
ast.target: 对已解析日历的设置应用部分补丁。成功时返回 true。仅限 Window-API — URL 传输无法表示嵌套的设置对象。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Run an AI query against the calendar with optional execute=true to apply the resulting operations.
ast.target: 对日历运行 AI 查询，可选 execute=true 以应用生成的操作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get a comprehensive overview of your calendar with charts, rankings, and key statistics — all in one place. Organized by name, category and recurring event series.
ast.target: 获取日历的全面概览，包括图表、排名和关键统计数据 — 全部集中在一个地方。按名称、类别和重复事件系列组织。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Pair a monthly activity heatmap with a breakdown pie chart — spot patterns and where your time actually went in one view.
ast.target: 将每月活动热图与细分饼图配对 — 在一个视图中发现模式以及您的时间实际去向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Visualize your events over time with an interactive heatmap. See patterns, streaks, and activity density at a glance.
ast.target: 使用交互式热图可视化您的事件随时间的变化。一目了然地查看模式、连续活动和活动密度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Which day should be the first day of the week in calendar views
ast.target: 日历视图中哪一天应作为一周的第一天

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gradient color applied uniformly to all day cells in every view
ast.target: 均匀应用于每个视图中所有日期单元格的渐变颜色

ast.name: description
ast.source: Define custom rules to auto-assign categories based on event names. Each preset can assign multiple categories to events with a specific name.
ast.target: 定义自定义规则以根据事件名称自动分配类别。每个预设可以为具有特定名称的事件分配多个类别。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically propagate frontmatter changes from recurring event sources to all physical instances. When you update custom properties (like category, priority, status) in a source event, all existing instances are updated immediately.
ast.target: 自动将 frontmatter 更改从重复事件源传播到所有物理实例。当您更新源事件中的自定义属性（如类别、优先级、状态）时，所有现有实例都会立即更新。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically propagate frontmatter changes across events that share the same title. When you update custom properties on one event, all other events with the same name are updated immediately.
ast.target: 自动在共享相同标题的事件之间传播 frontmatter 更改。当您更新一个事件的自定义属性时，所有其他具有相同名称的事件都会立即更新。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically propagate frontmatter changes across events that share the same category. When you update custom properties on one event, all other events with the same category are updated immediately.
ast.target: 自动在共享相同类别的事件之间传播 frontmatter 更改。当您更新一个事件的自定义属性时，所有其他具有相同类别的事件都会立即更新。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For more connected, advanced workflows, Prisma Pro unlocks external calendar synchronization, advanced visualizations, database integration, and other power-user capabilities built for serious planning inside Obsidian.
ast.target: 为了更互联、更高级的工作流程，Prisma Pro 解锁了外部日历同步、高级可视化、数据库集成以及其他为在 Obsidian 内进行严肃规划而构建的高级用户功能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Prevent automatic file modifications. When enabled, the plugin will not automatically write to files (notifications, recurring event generation). Manual actions like propagation will still work. Stored in sync.json to prevent syncing across devices.
ast.target: 防止自动文件修改。启用后，插件不会自动写入文件（通知、重复事件生成）。手动操作（如传播）仍然有效。存储在 sync.json 中以防止跨设备同步。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 时长：60 分钟，类别：专注

ast.name: description
ast.target: 时长：15 分钟，重复：每天

ast.name: description
ast.source: Preset to auto-fill when opening the create event modal
ast.target: 打开创建事件模态框时自动填充的预设

ast.name: description
ast.source: Free plan supports up to 2 event presets. Start your 30-day free trial for unlimited presets.
ast.target: 免费计划最多支持 2 个事件预设。开始您的 30 天免费试用，享受无限预设。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Browse the full changelog with every update since the first release
ast.target: 浏览自首次发布以来每次更新的完整更新日志

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sync events with CalDAV servers like Nextcloud, Radicale, Baikal, and other self-hosted solutions.
ast.target: 与 CalDAV 服务器（如 Nextcloud、Radicale、Baikal 和其他自托管解决方案）同步事件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Subscribe to ICS calendar URLs from Google Calendar, Outlook, Apple Calendar, and other providers to sync events automatically.
ast.target: 订阅来自 Google 日历、Outlook、Apple 日历和其他提供商的 ICS 日历 URL，以自动同步事件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Display public holidays on the calendar as virtual read-only events
ast.target: 在日历上显示公共假日，作为虚拟只读事件

ast.name: description
ast.source: ISO country code (e.g., US, GB, DE, CA)
ast.target: ISO 国家/地区代码（例如 US、GB、DE、CA）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional: State or province code (e.g., ca for California, ny for New York)
ast.target: 可选：州或省代码（例如 ca 代表加利福尼亚州，ny 代表纽约州）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional: Region code for more specific holidays
ast.target: 可选：区域代码，用于更具体的假日

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select which types of holidays to display
ast.target: 选择要显示的假日类型

ast.name: description
ast.target: 高优先级事件显示为红色

ast.name: description
ast.target: 已完成事件显示为绿色

ast.name: description
ast.source: AI chat with Claude and GPT, including query, manipulation, and planning modes, requires Prisma Calendar Pro.
ast.target: 与 Claude 和 GPT 进行 AI 聊天，包括查询、操作和规划模式，需要 Prisma Calendar Pro。

ast.name: error
ast.source: AI response could not be parsed as valid operations
ast.target: AI 响应无法解析为有效操作

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to move event to untracked
ast.target: 将事件移动到未跟踪状态失败

ast.name: heading
ast.source: Unlock the full experience with Pro

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Starting datetime value for timed events.
ast.target: 定时事件的开始日期时间值。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Ending datetime value for timed events.
ast.target: 定时事件的结束日期时间值。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The folder Prisma reads event notes from.
ast.target: Prisma 读取事件备注的文件夹。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Unexpected block-seq-ind on same line with key
ast.target: 在同一行中遇到意外的 block-seq-ind 与键

ast.name: message
